title: Rust announce processor (gradient tracking, sig verification)
description:
Port the announce processor from Python/Zephyr to Rust.

Python reference: python/src/lichen/announce/processor.py (305 LoC)
Zephyr reference: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/announce.c (peer tracking, sig verification portion)

Required functionality:
- Signature verification (schnorr48)
- IID-to-pubkey validation
- Sequence number tracking (RFC 1982 serial arithmetic)
- Duplicate detection
- Key pinning (TOFU)
- Gradient table updates

This is the RX path that processes incoming announces.
close_reason: Implemented: Rust announce processor in lichen-node/src/announce.rs with signature verification (schnorr48), IID-to-pubkey validation, RFC 1982 sequence number tracking, duplicate detection, TOFU key pinning, and gradient table updates. 14 tests cover all paths. Fixed pre-existing vec! macro issue in forward_buffer.rs tests.
